summary: Complete testing of Production Go-Live NEW FEATURES: Provider Test Connection Framework, Config Activation Workflow, Pre-Launch Validation Suite, and Live Ops Alerts. All 40 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend dashboard verified with all 7 tabs working correctly (Overview, Providers, Config, Infrastructure, Pre-Launch, Security, Alerts).
critical_code_review_comments: All new Production Go-Live endpoints require authentication (verified with 18 auth tests)
Provider Test Connection Framework working correctly - all 6 providers testable (twilio_sms, sendgrid_email, whatsapp, redis, sentry, otel)
Config Activation Workflow returns proper blocker/warning classification
Pre-Launch Validation Suite runs 12-step validation and returns NOT_READY/CONDITIONALLY_READY/GO_LIVE_READY verdict
Live Ops Alerts system tracks fired alerts with cooldown/dedup and webhook delivery log
Dashboard shows 39% readiness score and NOT_READY status (expected for dev mode)
All 7 tabs properly render with data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: None needed - tests use existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production Go-Live new features fully tested. All 4 new modules working: (1) Provider Test Connection with 6 providers, (2) Config Activation with blocker/warning classification, (3) Pre-Launch Validation with 12 steps, (4) Live Ops Alerts with cooldown/dedup. System in dev mode returns expected NOT_READY status.

provider_test_connection_framework.notes: All providers return 'not_configured' in dev mode (expected). Test result structure validated with latency_ms, mode, network_reachable, credential_valid fields.

config_activation_workflow.notes: Returns BLOCKED boot_status with MONGO_URL blocker (expected). Categories validated: database, messaging, observability.

prelaunch_validation_suite.notes: 12 validation steps executed. Returns NOT_READY verdict with recommended_actions. Auto-fires alert on NOT_READY.

live_ops_alerts.notes: 8 alert definitions with runbooks. Cooldown and suppression working. Webhook delivery log tracks delivery attempts.
